case_title: WILLY OSAGIEDE VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSAGIEDE, WILLY AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-30-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSAGIEDE, WILLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSAGIEDE, WILLY AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DALENE BRAMER--EMPLOYEE COUNSEL. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
